Name: Customers Over 250K
Expression:
VAR CustomerTotals =
    SUMMARIZE (
        factAccount,
        factAccount[CustomerSK],
        "TotalBalance", SUM ( factAccount[TotalBalance] )
    )
RETURN
COUNTROWS (
    FILTER ( CustomerTotals, [TotalBalance] > 250000 )
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
VAR CustomerTotals =
    SUMMARIZE (
        factAccount,
        factAccount[CustomerSK],
        "TotalBalance", SUM ( factAccount[TotalBalance] )
    )
RETURN
COUNTROWS (
    FILTER ( CustomerTotals, [TotalBalance] > 250000 )
)

Name: DAX Insured Amount
Expression:
SUMX (
    factAccount,
    VAR Bal = factAccount[TotalBalance]
    RETURN
        IF ( Bal <= 250000, Bal, 250000 )
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
SUMX (
    factAccount,
    VAR Bal = factAccount[TotalBalance]
    RETURN
        IF ( Bal <= 250000, Bal, 250000 )
)

Name: DAX Uninsured Amount
Expression:
SUMX (
    factAccount,
    VAR Bal = factAccount[TotalBalance]
    RETURN
        IF ( Bal > 250000, Bal - 250000, 0 )
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
SUMX (
    factAccount,
    VAR Bal = factAccount[TotalBalance]
    RETURN
        IF ( Bal > 250000, Bal - 250000, 0 )
)

Name: Value
Expression:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( KPI_Metadata[KPI] ),

    -- Accounts
    "Total Accounts",        FORMAT ( [Total Accounts], "#,0" ),
    "Total Customers",       FORMAT ( [Total Customers], "#,0" ),
    "Customers Over 250K",   FORMAT ( [Customers Over 250K], "#,0" ),

    -- Balance
    "Total Balance",         FORMAT ( [Total Balance], "$#,0,,M" ),
    "Insured Amount",        FORMAT ( [Insured Amount], "$#,0,,M" ),
    "Uninsured Amount",      FORMAT ( [Uninsured Amount], "$#,0,,M" ),

    BLANK()
)
ExpressionTrimmed:
SWITCH (
    SELECTEDVALUE ( KPI_Metadata[KPI] ),

    -- Accounts
    "Total Accounts",        FORMAT ( [Total Accounts], "#,0" ),
    "Total Customers",       FORMAT ( [Total Customers], "#,0" ),
    "Customers Over 250K",   FORMAT ( [Customers Over 250K], "#,0" ),

    -- Balance
    "Total Balance",         FORMAT ( [Total Balance], "$#,0,,M" ),
    "Insured Amount",        FORMAT ( [Insured Amount], "$#,0,,M" ),
    "Uninsured Amount",      FORMAT ( [Uninsured Amount], "$#,0,,M" ),

    BLANK()
)
